# Beudox HR Management System - Technical Context

## Overview
Beudox HR is a comprehensive human resources management system built as a modern React single-page application. It serves as a complete HR solution for organizations, handling employee management, payroll, evaluations, and administrative tasks.

## Architecture & Technology

### Frontend Stack
- **Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript for type safety
- **Build System**: Vite for fast development and optimized production builds
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with shadcn/ui component library (40+ pre-built components)
- **State Management**: 
  - React Query (TanStack Query) for server state management and caching
  - React Context for global state (auth, theme)
  - React Hook Form for complex form state
- **Routing**: React Router DOM v6 with protected routes and role-based access control
- **Rich Text**: Tiptap editor for HR policy documents
- **Charts**: Recharts for data visualization
- **Validation**: Zod schemas for runtime type validation

### Backend & Database
- **Platform**: Supabase (PostgreSQL database + Auth + Storage + Edge Functions)
- **Database Schema**: 40+ tables covering all HR domains
- **Authentication**: Supabase Auth with role-based permissions
- **Real-time**: Supabase real-time subscriptions for live updates
- **Edge Functions**: Serverless functions for complex business logic (payroll generation, invoice PDFs)

## Application Structure

### Routing & Pages
The application follows a hierarchical routing structure with role-based access control:

```
/ (root) → redirects to /login or /dashboard
├── /login - Authentication
├── /forgot-password - Password recovery
├── /dashboard - Main dashboard
├── /employees - Employee management
│   ├── /new - Add employee
│   ├── /:id - Employee profile
│   └── /:id/edit - Edit employee
├── /projects - Project management
├── /clients - Client management
├── /invoices - Invoice management
├── /hr-policies - HR document management
├── /evaluations - Performance reviews
│   ├── /quarterly - Formal evaluations
│   └── /daily - Daily feedback
├── /payroll - Salary processing
├── /loans - Employee loans
├── /settings - System configuration
└── /holidays - Public holiday management
```

### Component Organization
- **Layout Components**: AppLayout, AppSidebar, TopBar for consistent UI structure
- **UI Components**: 40+ shadcn/ui components (buttons, forms, tables, dialogs, etc.)
- **Feature Components**: Domain-specific components like EvaluationTimeline, RichTextEditor
- **Form Components**: Reusable form inputs with validation

### Key Business Logic

#### Role-Based Access Control
Five user roles with granular permissions:
- **CEO**: Full system access
- **HR Manager**: Employee management, evaluations, policies
- **Finance Manager**: Payroll, invoices, financial data
- **Team Lead**: Project management, team evaluations
- **Employee**: Personal data, self-service features

#### Core Business Entities
- **Companies**: Multi-tenant architecture supporting multiple organizations
- **Employees**: Complete employee profiles with salary, attendance, evaluations
- **Attendance**: Automated tracking with overtime calculations
- **Payroll**: Monthly salary processing with deductions and bonuses
- **Evaluations**: Dual evaluation system (quarterly formal + daily feedback)
- **Projects**: Project management with team assignments
- **Invoices**: Client billing with PDF generation
- **HR Policies**: Version-controlled policy documents

## Database Schema Highlights

### Core Tables
- `companies` - Organization data and settings
- `employees` - Employee profiles and organizational structure
- `attendance_records` - Daily attendance with OT calculations
- `payroll_records` - Monthly salary processing
- `evaluations` - Quarterly performance reviews
- `daily_evaluations` - Real-time feedback system
- `projects` - Project management and assignments
- `invoices` - Client billing and payments
- `hr_documents` - Policy documents with versioning

### Key Relationships
- Employees belong to companies
- All business data is company-scoped for multi-tenancy
- Projects link employees, clients, and invoices
- Evaluations connect employees with performance data
- Attendance feeds into payroll calculations

## Development Patterns

### Data Fetching
- React Query for declarative data fetching
- Optimistic updates for better UX
- Background refetching for data freshness
- Error boundaries for graceful failure handling

### Form Management
- React Hook Form for complex forms
- Zod validation schemas
- Controlled components with proper error handling
- File uploads with progress indicators

### Component Patterns
- Compound components for complex UI
- Custom hooks for reusable logic
- TypeScript generics for type-safe components
- CSS-in-JS with Tailwind for styling

### State Management
- Server state: React Query
- UI state: useState/useReducer
- Global state: Context + useReducer
- Form state: React Hook Form

## Performance Considerations

### Optimization Techniques
- Code splitting with dynamic imports
- Image optimization and lazy loading
- Virtual scrolling for large lists
- Memoization of expensive computations
- Efficient re-renders with React.memo

### Caching Strategy
- React Query for API response caching
- Browser caching for static assets
- Service worker for offline capability
- Local storage for user preferences

## Security & Compliance

### Authentication
- Supabase Auth with JWT tokens
- Row-level security (RLS) policies
- Session management with automatic refresh
- Password reset and email verification

### Data Protection
- Company-scoped data isolation
- Encrypted sensitive data storage
- Audit trails for critical operations
- GDPR-compliant data handling

## Testing Strategy

### Unit Testing
- Vitest for fast unit tests
- React Testing Library for component testing
- Mock Service Worker for API mocking
- Test utilities for common patterns

### Integration Testing
- Playwright for end-to-end testing
- Critical user workflows covered
- Cross-browser compatibility
- Visual regression testing

## Deployment & DevOps

### Build Process
- Vite for optimized production builds
- Asset optimization and code splitting
- Environment-specific configurations
- CDN deployment for static assets

### CI/CD Pipeline
- Automated testing on commits
- Code quality checks (ESLint, TypeScript)
- Automated deployment on main branch
- Rollback capabilities for production issues

## Key Integrations

### Supabase Features Used
- Authentication (auth.users)
- Database (40+ tables with relationships)
- Real-time subscriptions
- Storage for file uploads
- Edge Functions for serverless compute
- Database functions for complex queries

### Third-Party Libraries
- **UI**: Radix UI primitives via shadcn/ui
- **Charts**: Recharts for data visualization
- **Forms**: React Hook Form + Zod
- **Rich Text**: Tiptap ecosystem
- **Icons**: Lucide React
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS + CSS variables
- **Date Handling**: date-fns

## Business Logic Highlights

### Payroll Processing
- Monthly salary calculations
- Overtime and bonus calculations
- Tax deductions and loan repayments
- Automated payslip generation
- Approval workflows

### Evaluation System
- Configurable evaluation parameters
- Score-based assessments
- Historical tracking
- Role-based visibility
- Recommendation system

### Attendance Management
- Automated check-in/out tracking
- Holiday and weekend detection
- Overtime calculations
- Leave balance integration
- Import from external systems

### Invoice Generation
- Automated invoice creation
- PDF generation with templates
- Payment tracking
- Client-specific pricing
- Multi-currency support

This technical context provides a comprehensive overview of the Beudox HR system's architecture, technologies, and business logic. The system is designed for scalability, maintainability, and user experience in enterprise HR management.
